heading: Annual report
label: 230107 Annual report
text: Not later than January 1 of each year, the corporation shall submit a report to Congress on the activities of the corporation during the prior fiscal year. The report may not be printed as a public document.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)23010736:118., ; , , .May 28, 1936, ch. 471, § 849 Stat. 1391Pub. L. 88–504, § 4(10)78 Stat. 637Aug. 30, 1964The word “submit” is substituted for “make and transmit” for consistency in the revised title.
